narrative:
Bowling Green Twp. township has 373 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.8 percentage points.
